DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF DESOTO CAB COMPANY, INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO DISCOVERY IS GRANTED. DEFENDANTS ROSALYN P. BELLA AND GINO BELLA SHALL SERVE VERIFIED RESPONSES, WITHOUT OBJECTIONS, TO PLAINTIFF'S LIMITED FORM INTERROGATORIES TO DEFENDANTS, SET ONE AND PLAINTIFF'S REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS TO DEFENDANTS, SET ONE BY 5:00 P.M. ON AUGUST 18, 2014. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED IN THE AMOUNT OF $765.00. DEFENDANTS ROSALYN PAYAS BELLA AND GINO BELLA SHALL PAY THE PLAINITFF THE SUM OF $765 AS REASONABLE COSTS AND ATTORNEY'S FEES WITHIN TWENTY (20) DAYS OF SERVICE OF THIS ORDER. ORDER IS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS)JUDGE PRO TEM: REBECCA WOODSON, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

Mtn To Compel Answers To Disco
Off Calendar Jul-18-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Colleen Li, Esq of Kern Noda Devine & Segal (415-474-1900) for Desoto Cab Company Plaintiff and moving party
No other appearance on the matter.

Moving party appeared and stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem. ARGUED. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows: Plaintiff DESOTO CAB COMPANY, INC.'s Motion to Compel Answers to Discovery is GRANTED. Defendants ROSALYN P. BELLA and GINO BELLA shall serve verified responses, without objections, to Plaintiff's Limited Form Interrogatories to Defendants, Set One and Plaintiff's Requests for Production of Documents to Defendants, Set One by 5:00 p.m. on August 18, 2014. Plaintiff's request for sanctions is GRANTED in the amount of $765.00. Defendants Rosalyn Payas Bella and Gino Bella shall pay the Plainitff the sum of $765 as reasonable costs and attorney's fees within twenty (20) days of service of this order. Order is signed in Open Court. (see scanned order for details)Judge Pro Tem: Rebecca Woodson, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

Mtn To Compel Answers To Disco
Off Calendar Jul-08-2014 Continued To Jul-18-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PLAINTIFF DESOTO CAB COMPANY, INC.'S Motion To Compel Answers To Discovery is Continued to July 18, 2014 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving and reply papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than July 8, 2014 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the opposition papers. Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
